title: bassia canaliculata
intro: Bassia canaliculata, also known as Chinese lantern plant, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. The medicinal properties of Bassia canaliculata lie in its ability to cool the body, reduce heat, and alleviate symptoms associated with fever and inflammation. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. In traditional Chinese medicine, Bassia canaliculata is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and ointments to treat various ailments, including fever, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues.
